## Entities.Confections.AnyConfectionEntity type

Discriminated union of all confection data types. Use this when working with raw confection data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyConfectionEntity = IMoldedBonBonEntity | IBarTruffleEntity | IRolledTruffleEntity;
```
**References:** [IMoldedBonBonEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.imoldedbonbonentity.md)<!-- -->, [IBarTruffleEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.ibartruffleentity.md)<!-- -->, [IRolledTruffleEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.irolledtruffleentity.md)
